text_raw: A worthy sacrifice walks into my grasp.
text_clean: A worthy sacrifice walks into my grasp.

text_raw: How could one such as you...?!
text_clean: How could one such as you...?!

text_raw: You dare strike at one feared even by gods?

text_raw: Your existence is but a moment's breath!
